query:
SELECT v.id, v.variantCode, v.variantName, v.status, v.productId, 
       pb.id as box_id, pb.length, pb.width, pb.height, pb.cbm, pb.grossWeight, pb.netWeight
FROM product_variants v
LEFT JOIN package_boxes pb ON v.id = pb.variantId
WHERE v.variantCode IN ('DC-001-GRY-V034', 'DC-001-GRY-V035')
ORDER BY v.variantCode, pb.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT v.id, v.variantCode, v.variantName, v.status, v.productId, 
       pb.id as box_id, pb.length, pb.width, pb.height, pb.cbm, pb.grossWeight, pb.netWeight
FROM product_variants v
LEFT JOIN package_boxes pb ON v.id = pb.variantId
WHERE v.variantCode IN ('DC-001-GRY-V034', 'DC-001-GRY-V035')
ORDER BY v.variantCode, pb.id;
